text: The debate appears to be leaning towards a YES outcome, with the oracle probability at 61.00% and a positive edge of 15.00%. However, the market probability of 46.00% suggests a significant portion of participants believe the event will not occur. It is crucial to ensure that the reasoning behind the YES position is robust and not simply a reflection of a prevailing sentiment, and that the minority view (46% market probability) is adequately considered in the final decision.
